get_a_quote.overview: Move Logistics offers free, no-obligation estimates for all moving services. Contact us by phone, text, or through our website to get a personalized quote.

quote_methods.description: Call us to speak with a moving consultant who will walk you through the process and provide a free estimate.
quote_methods.availability: Monday-Friday 7:00 AM - 5:00 PM, Saturday 7:00 AM - 2:00 PM

quote_methods.description: Text us with your move details for a quick response and estimate.
quote_methods.availability: Monday-Friday 7:00 AM - 5:00 PM, Saturday 7:00 AM - 2:00 PM

quote_methods.description: Fill out our online quote request form on our website and a moving consultant will contact you promptly.
Send us an email with your move details and we'll get back to you with a quote.

what_to_have_ready: Preferred move date (and flexibility if any)
Approximate size of home or office (number of bedrooms or square footage)
Any specialty items (piano, antiques, heavy equipment, etc.)
Any access concerns (stairs, elevators, long carry distances, narrow streets)

quote_process.description: Our moving consultant will discuss your specific needs, the scope of your move, and any special requirements to provide an accurate, transparent estimate.
steps: Contact us by phone, text, email, or online form
Discuss your move details with a consultant
Schedule your move at a time that works for you

local_moving.overview: Move Logistics provides comprehensive local moving services throughout San Antonio and surrounding areas. Whether you're moving from a studio apartment or a large family home, our career movers handle every detail with care.
services_included: Loading and unloading of all household items
Floor and wall protection at both locations
Careful handling of fragile and valuable items
why_choose_us: Career movers with minimum 5+ years of experience on every job
80% of our business comes from referrals and repeat customers
Google 4.9/5 stars, Yelp 4.8/5 stars, Angi 5/5 stars
local_moving.pricing: Contact us for a free estimate. Pricing depends on the size of your move, distance, and services needed. Call (210) 942-0357 or text (210) 838-7682.

long_distance.overview: Move Logistics is your one-stop shop for interstate and long-distance moving. We handle moves across state lines with the same professional standards we apply to local relocations. Fully licensed for interstate transport.
services_included: Honest and open communication throughout the entire move
process: Contact us for a free long-distance estimate
A moving consultant will assess the scope and plan your move
Our career movers pack, load, and transport your belongings safely
We deliver and unload at your new location on the scheduled date
long_distance.pricing: Long-distance pricing is based on the weight of your shipment, distance, and services required. Contact us for a free estimate at (210) 942-0357.

storage.overview: Move Logistics offers short-term and long-term storage solutions for clients who need to store belongings between moves or during transitions. All storage is in-house and monitored around the clock.

storage_types.description: Temperature and humidity-controlled units ideal for sensitive items like electronics, artwork, wooden furniture, and documents.
Standard storage units for items that don't require temperature control. Great for general household goods, boxes, and durable items.

storage.security: All storage units are in-house and monitored around the clock to ensure the safety of your belongings.
storage.terms: Both short-term and long-term storage available. Flexible terms to fit your needs.
storage.pricing: Contact us for storage rates and availability. Call (210) 942-0357 or text (210) 838-7682.

packing_services.overview: Why do the packing yourself when you can hire a professional packer and make your move even more stress-free? Our packers have the experience and knowledge to carefully protect all your items on move day.
services_included: Full-service packing of your entire home or office
Partial packing — we pack the items you choose
Unpacking services at your new location
Specialty packing for fragile and valuable items
packing_materials: Specialty cartons for mirrors, artwork, and TVs

options.description: Our team packs your entire home or office from start to finish. We bring all materials and handle everything so you don't have to lift a finger.
You pack some items yourself, and we handle the rest — perfect for fragile items, kitchens, or rooms you'd rather leave to the pros.
We provide professional-grade moving supplies so you can pack at your own pace. Boxes, tape, bubble wrap, and more.

packing_services.pricing: Contact us for packing service rates. Pricing depends on the size of your home and the level of service needed. Call (210) 942-0357.

office_moving.overview: Move Logistics specializes in moving entire corporate offices and relocating them with minimal disruption to your business operations. Our professionally trained movers handle everything from packing to heavy equipment.
services_included: Packing and wrapping of all office contents
process: Schedule a free consultation to assess your office move
We create a custom relocation plan to minimize downtime
Our career movers execute the move efficiently and carefully
We set up at your new location so you can get back to business
office_moving.pricing: Office moving pricing depends on the size of your office, equipment involved, and distance. Contact us for a free consultation at (210) 942-0357.

white_glove.overview: Move Logistics offers white glove moving services for customers who want the highest level of care and attention for their belongings. This premium service ensures every item receives special handling from start to finish.
services_included: Extra care for fragile, antique, and high-value items
Custom crating for artwork, mirrors, and delicate pieces
Furniture placement and setup at destination
ideal_for: High-value electronics and home theater systems
white_glove.pricing: White glove service pricing is customized based on the items and scope of your move. Call (210) 942-0357 for a free consultation.

contact_info.service_area: San Antonio, Boerne, New Braunfels, Austin, Houston, Dallas/Fort Worth, and nationwide for long-distance moves.

about.description: Move Logistics is a family-owned and operated moving company based in San Antonio, Texas, serving the local community and the nation since 1990. With over 35 years of experience, we have built our reputation on trust, professionalism, and exceptional service.
about.referral_rate: 80% of our business comes from referrals and repeat customers — a testament to the quality of service we deliver on every move.
about.team: We send out 'Career Movers' on every relocation project — experienced professionals with a minimum of 5+ years in the moving industry. Our team is trained to handle your belongings with the utmost care.
values: Honest and open communication throughout every move
Treating your belongings as if they were our own
Stress-free moving experience from start to finish
